dialogueChunks.intro: Something terrible happened, {player_name}. People are gone: taken while the settlement slept. The guards found signs of a struggle and tracks leading {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We counted the missing at dawn. {quest_stakes} are in the hands of {quest_threat}. The {enemy_type} left drag marks and broken doors, but they moved fast. Whoever organized this knew exactly where to strike.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone brave enough to follow those tracks {quest_time_pressure}. The captors have a head start, but they are moving slow with prisoners. Will you help us?

playerResponses.text: I will follow the trail immediately.
What can you tell me about the attackers?
This sounds too dangerous for me.

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} received a message two days ago: an urgent summons to meet someone {location_hint}. They left at once. They never arrived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The message was a forgery. {quest_ally} confirmed it matches none of our couriers. Someone lured {target_npc} out deliberately, and the {enemy_type} were spotted in that direction days before.
dialogueChunks.outro: We fear the worst, but there is still hope. {target_npc} may still be alive. Will you search for them, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: I will find them. Which way did they go?
I will need supplies before I head out.
They are probably already gone. I am sorry.

dialogueChunks.intro: A ransom note was pinned to the gate this morning. The {enemy_type} have taken {quest_focus} and are demanding {quest_item} in exchange. The deadline is soon.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We cannot pay what they ask: we barely have enough to survive the season. But if we refuse, they have promised to make an example. {quest_ally} thinks their camp is somewhere {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need someone to either negotiate or strike {quest_time_pressure}. {player_name}, can we count on you?

playerResponses.text: I will deal with them directly.
Maybe we can outwit them. I will try.
You should just pay the ransom.
